title: Wilted Dutch Callaloo Braised
description: A hearty, sugar-free twist on traditional Dutch cuisine featuring tender callaloo and a rich, tangy sauce.
instructions: Heat a Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the bacon and cook until crispy, about 10 minutes.
Remove the bacon from the pot, leaving the grease behind.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the callaloo to the pot and cook until wilted, about 10 minutes.
Add the reserved bacon to the pot and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Let the dish rest for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
Reheat the dish before serving, if desired.
